target_policy: The model directly predicts future returns. Prices are reconstructed from P_{t-1} and predicted returns. Direction metrics are derived from return signs.
ablation_protocol: Train Full MDHGNN once per seed; evaluate the same checkpoint with one channel/path masked at inference.
note: All reported experiments use the common real-observation period beginning on 2011-07-22. The final modelling sample starts on 2012-01-13 after weekly resampling and technical-indicator construction. The main comparison should not claim MDHGNN is best on every metric; it is competitive at h=1, while MLP/Naive remain stronger on some h=2 metrics.
